title: Sqlitelogictest error message in group by with coalesce
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT DISTINCT - COALESCE ( - 86, + cor0.col1, cor0.col1, - cor0.col0 ) AS col2 FROM tab0 AS cor0 GROUP BY cor0.col2, cor0.col0;
key_bug_features: GROUP BY with COALESCE in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 VARCHAR(50), col3 DATE);
INSERT INTO tab1(col0, col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1, NULL, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO tab1(col0, col1, col2, col3) VALUES (2, 10, NULL, '2023-01-02');
SELECT COALESCE(col2, 'default') AS col2_value, COUNT(*) FROM tab1 GROUP BY COALESCE(col2, 'default');
SELECT DISTINCT - COALESCE(-col1, +tab1.col1, -tab1.col0) AS col_result FROM tab1 GROUP BY col_result, col0;
